---
title: "Expiration calendar & scheduled reminders"
labels: enhancement, feature
assignees: ''
---

Create a calendar view for expirations and allow scheduling reminders for items nearing expiry. Integrate Capacitor LocalNotifications to trigger reminders on device.

Acceptance:
- Calendar view highlights items by expiry date.
- Users can schedule reminders per-item (or bulk for a category).

Estimate: 4 story points
